description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Gibs Pasta Karahi Macaroni, featuring a vibrant red and blue color scheme with gold and white accents. The front displays the brand logo, product name, and an appetizing image of cooked macaroni with vegetables and herbs. The side panels provide nutritional information, product details, and certifications, while the back is covered with detailed boiling instructions, ingredient lists, and additional graphics of vegetables and pasta. The box is sealed and designed to stand upright, with a flat top and bottom for easy stacking or shelving. The packaging is typical for dry pasta products, offering protection and clear branding for retail environments.
description: A colorful, rectangular cardboard box of Gibs Pasta Karahi Macaroni with detailed branding, cooking instructions, and a food image on the front. The box is designed for upright display and retail shelving.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main branding, product name, and a large image of cooked macaroni with vegetables.
description_view_1: The left side view displays nutritional information and additional product details on a blue background.
description_view_2: The back view features boiling instructions, ingredient lists, and decorative graphics of vegetables and pasta.
description_view_3: The right side view provides a product description, certifications, and manufacturer information.
attribute_labeling: Front: brand logo, product name, food image, '2 in 1 Recipe Mix Sachet Inside', Halal symbol, weight; Sides: nutritional information, product description, certifications; Back: boiling instructions, ingredient lists, decorative graphics.
attribute_product_name: Gibs Pasta Karahi Macaroni Recipe Pack
